lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass C:\Users\lenovo\Desktop\王金玉\海北附表2.3\海晏县隐患要素分布数据 海晏县隐患要素分布断面线 折线 # 否 否 "PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_99E",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",99.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]];-5123200 -10002100 450265407.001579;-100000 10000;-100000 10000;0.001;0.001;0.001;IsHighPrecision" # 0 0 0 # 与模板相同

SpatialJoin 海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县隐患要素分布断面线 海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint C:\Users\lenovo\Desktop\王金玉\海北附表2.3\海晏县隐患要素分布数据\海晏县隐患要素分布断面线和点连接.shp 一对一连接 KEEP_ALL "Id "Id" true true false 6 Long 0 6,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县隐患要素分布断面线,Id,-1,-1;序号 "序号" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,序号,-1,-1;名称 "名称" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,名称,0,254;X "X" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,X,-1,-1;Y "Y" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,Y,-1,-1;TYPES "TYPES" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,TYPES,0,254;rivel "rivel" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,rivel,0,254;NAME "NAME" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,NAME,0,254;PID "PID" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,PID,0,254;RVNM "RVNM" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,RVNM,0,254;RVCD "RVCD" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,海北三县面图层\海晏县\海晏县_XYTableToPoint,RVCD,0,254" 相交 "5 Meters" # #
